templates.title: Descriptive statistics — mean, median, mode, stdev
Percentile calculator
templates.description: Hitung P25, P50, P75, P90 dari list
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(data, p):
    """Percentile 0-100."""
    data = sorted(data)
    if not data:
        return None
    k = (len(data)-1) * p / 100.0
    f = int(k)
    c = min(f+1, len(data)-1)
    if f == c:
        return data[f]
    d0 = data[f] * (c - k)
    d1 = data[c] * (k - f)
    return d0 + d1

templates.title: Normalize — min-max & z-score
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(data, method='minmax'):
    """method: 'minmax' atau 'zscore'."""
    data = list(data)
    if not data:
        return []
    if method == 'zscore':
        import statistics
        mean = statistics.mean(data)
        stdev = statistics.stdev(data) if len(data) > 1 else 1
        return [(x - mean) / stdev if stdev else 0 for x in data]
    else:
        mn, mx = min(data), max(data)
        rng = mx - mn or 1
        return [(x - mn) / rng for x in data]

templates.title: Moving / rolling average
Simple linear regression
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(x, y):
    """Return {'slope': m, 'intercept': b, 'r2': r2}."""
    n = len(x)
    if n == 0 or n != len(y):
        raise ValueError('x and y must match')
    sx = sum(x); sy = sum(y)
    sxy = sum(a*b for a, b in zip(x, y))
    sxx = sum(a*a for a in x)
    denom = n * sxx - sx * sx
    if denom == 0:
        return {'slope': 0, 'intercept': sy/n if n else 0, 'r2': 0}
    m = (n * sxy - sx * sy) / denom
    b = (sy - m * sx) / n
    y_mean = sy / n
    ss_tot = sum((yi - y_mean)**2 for yi in y)
    ss_res = sum((yi - (m*xi + b))**2 for xi, yi in zip(x, y))
    r2 = 1 - ss_res / ss_tot if ss_tot else 0
    return {'slope': m, 'intercept': b, 'r2': r2}

templates.title: Pearson & Spearman correlation
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(x, y):
    """Pearson correlation."""
    n = len(x)
    if n == 0 or n != len(y):
        return 0.0
    import statistics
    mx = statistics.mean(x); my = statistics.mean(y)
    num = sum((a - mx) * (b - my) for a, b in zip(x, y))
    den_x = sum((a - mx) ** 2 for a in x)
    den_y = sum((b - my) ** 2 for b in y)
    den = (den_x * den_y) ** 0.5
    return num / den if den else 0.0
